title: ZIP-32 HD key derivation from BIP-39 mnemonic
description: Generate 24-word BIP-39 mnemonic → 64-byte seed → ZIP-32 HD wallet. Derive account 0 spending key, full viewing key (FVK), incoming viewing key (IVK). nie-core identity key (Ed25519) must remain separate — never derive from or to wallet seed.
close_reason: Done: BIP-39 mnemonic → 64-byte seed → SaplingExtendedSpendingKey::from_seed + OrchardSpendingKey::from_seed implemented in commit 3aa54ef and 84f89bb. wallet init/restore commands in commands.rs.
